harness.working_tree: WIN2METAL Phase 2 (Bucket A) validation on Apple M4 16GB. Binary is the FROZEN base build /Volumes/Untitled/camelid-base-28f224b (camelid v0.1.7-92-g28f224b, commit 28f224b); no src changes in this branch. Outputs salvaged under qa/capability/mac_*_out/<row>/.
harness.e2e_harness: qa/capability/* Metal harness; outputs under qa/capability/mac_*_out/llama-3.2-3b

evidence.summary: e2e on Metal (qa/capability/smoke.sh, Apple M4, GPU-resident decode): n=3 returns 3 choices with indices [0,1,2] and aggregated usage 13/18/31 (prompt counted once, completion summed); each choice carries independent per-choice-seeded content. n>1+stream and n>1+camelid_receipt fail closed (HTTP 400). Decoder/API contract — re-confirmed identical behavior on the Metal backend (no Metal-specific regression). Evidence: qa/capability/mac_smoke_out/llama-3.2-3b/n3.json, n_stream.json.
